entry.title: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Hello - can you please help to fix the below code ? Req is to copy the complete xml but replace just one field by incrementing its value by 1.

Input:
<item>
<Field>10</Field1>
</item>
<item>
<Field>20</Field1>
</item>

Output:
<item>
<Field>11</Field1>
</item>
<item>
<Field>21</Field1>
</item>

I am pasting xsl I wrote with input and output values.

XSL:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>

<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:apply-templates select="*"/>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
<xsl:variable name="i" select="//RETAILNUMBER"/>
<RETAILNUMBER>
<xsl:value-of select="$i+1"/>
</RETAILNUMBER>
</xsl:template>

<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

Input xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>0</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root

Output (Note the to be values in the output for retailnumber

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER> //should bd 2
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER> //should bd 3
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow for Purchase Order Approval
entry.content:
We can transport the workflows for Purchase requisitions and Purchase order from  Dev to QA to Prod.
User id can be different in different systems but we can have the same employee id can be same across systems .

the below OSS note gives detailed information.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2813272

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects Private Cloud Edition (PCE) Webcast Overview
entry.content: @TammyPowlas Thank you! Are there any latest updates on this?

Hi Experts,

Where can I find the Business function that are required to be activated for PS in S4HANA 2023 system .

 

Thanks,

Kehkashan A J

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hi Thore,

at least for a HANA backend you can also try to achieve this by changing the connection in DSP from DPA to Cloud Connector.

Br.,

Dirk

entry.title: Re: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
entry.content: Make sure there's no OSS notes you need to apply by searching in support.sap.com. Try to debug line by line within the BAPI. Somewhere it could be clearing due to no reason whatsoever. I've noticed this while working with a lot of BAPIs.  Also check the BAdIs, sometimes there's logic which clears the depending on some predefined condition in the BAdI.

entry.title: Re: MDK Inline Signature Capture file size
entry.content: Ok thanks Bill. I'll look into that.

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects Private Cloud Edition (PCE) Webcast Overview
entry.content: Hi @rpuranik thank you for reading.  I do not have any updates.

entry.title: iOS Usage Strings not updating in build
entry.content:
I've tried updating multiple iOS Usage Strings in the Build Service Asset section, but most of the fields are not properly updated in the actual iOS build's Info.plist. I'm using Build Apps Community Edition.

To be sure this wasn't an isolated issue, I created a new app and changed all of the Usage Strings to "TEST UPDATE" in the Assets tab, and only 3 of the strings keys actually updated in the build (screenshots below).

I've figured out how to manually update this with help from this previous post, but is no one else having this issue? Apple required that I updated these strings for camera/image library usage before they'd approve the app.

entry.title: Re: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after de...
entry.content: Do you see any errors in the approuter log?

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
This XSLT would do it - 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>
<xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/>

<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
  <xsl:copy>
    <xsl:value-of select=". + 1"/>
  </xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: how to manage sap landscapes by two solution manager system
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have the next scenario with a customer:

There’s a productive Solution Manager (SMP) where ChaRM manages the transports of a classical 3-systems landscape (ABD100 , ABQ300, ABP300).

____ChaRM in SMP___
ABD100 -> ABQ300 -> ABP300

A new Solution Manager (SMQ) with the role of DEV/QAS is going to be implemented for training and testing  purposes of new solman functionalities.


We want to configure ChaRM in this new Solman SMQ to train new staff in the use of the functionality and obviously we need a managed landscape to move transport requests. According to the note 2915372, only one ChaRM can manage the whole landscape, so, it is not possible to use the landscape of ABD100, ABQ300 and ABP300. But I want to know if it is possible to create 2 new clients in the system ABD (ABD200 and ABD250) to simulate a 2-systems test landscape managed by solman SMQ and handle transport requests between these new clients using ChaRM.
__ChaRM in SMQ__
ABD200 -> ABD250
Please also let me know if there are special considerations, for example it comes to my mind that all transport requests will be created in system ABD but in different clients and managed by different ChaRMs. Can this lead to a problem in the way that ChaRM operates?

Another option is that this new 2-systems test landscape can be created with two clients in the system SMQ (SMQ200 and SMQ250)

__ChaRM in SMQ__
SMQ200 -> SMQ250
Is this possible? Can a Solution Manager be managed by itself?

Kind Regards.

Arturo

entry.title: Re: PS Easy Cost Planning Integration with S/4HANA Financial Planning
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

This article is very helpful. However, we have activated UPA in our system.

As per this blogpost - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/financial-planning-with-universal-parallel-accounting-in-sap-s-4hana-2022/ba-p/13581094 it's mentioned that costing model (CKCM) does not work with UPA. 

Can you please also confirm if this functionality will also work with UPA and can we still use ECP without the costing model (CKCM)

entry.title: How to add missing fields to app
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

There are some fields missing on the app 'Manage Customer Returns - version 2' (ID: F4832), like "Sales office" and "Sales Group". We can see those fields are present on app 'Manage Sales Orders - version 2' (ID: F3893).

Is there a way to add those fields on the app screen?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add missing fields to app
entry.content:
You can add those fields through Adapt Ui.

  1. Open app 'Manage Customer Returns - version 2' (or other desired app);
  2. Click on your profile icon, on the right-upper corner, and then on 'Adapt Ui';
  3. Add new fields;
  4. The fields available to addition will be presented on a list, you can select the desired ones. For the app Manage Customer Returns - version 2, the fields 'Sales Group' and 'Sales Office' can be added.
  5. Finally, save the new screen version and activate it.

entry.title: SAP->CPI Integration - WSDL Creation
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are trying to integrate ECC with an ecommerce platform via CPI.

SAP ECC would send data to CPI. 

Question is - what are best practices for the wsdl creation if there are any. 

I would really appreciate the information.

entry.title: Re: Can you trust Pam?
entry.content: Mohamed225 - https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam. I'll update the blog to include this link. If you can't access this link you probably need the SAP super user in your organisation to create an s-user for you.https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/users.html

entry.title: SAP Developer News, September 5th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/09/05/sap-developer-news-september-5th-2024/

DESCRIPTION

Devtoberfest

  • Devtoberfest Community Page to Join/Register: https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/gh-p/Devtoberfest

Five years of CPILint:

  • Five years of CPILint:
     https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/five-years-of-cpilint/ba-p/13812638
  • Release of version 1.0.5:
     https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/cpilint-version-1-0-5-is-here/ba-p/13810431
  • Devtoberfest session - 🔴 Automate your SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPILint:
     https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/automate-your-sap-cloud-integration-governance-with-cpilint/ev-p/13802890

ML and AI learning content

  • Leveraging Image Embedding and HANA Vector Engine for Reverse Product Search: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leveraging-image-embedding-and-hana-vector-engine-for-reverse-product/ba-p/13798320
  • How Metadata Enrichment can enhance SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine on GenAI scenarios: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-metadata-enrichment-can-enhance-sap-hana-cloud-vector-engine-on-genai/ba-p/13662543
  • “Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core” CodeJam in Munich: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core/ev-p/13854907
  • "Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA" as an SAP CodeJam topic: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-quot-as-a-new-sap/ba-p/13574098
  • Machine Learning with SAP HANA Cloud: a time-series forecasting example: https://community.sap.com/t5/artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning-blogs/hands-on-tutorial-machine-learning-with-sap-hana-cloud/ba-p/13683430

SAP BTP Solution Diagrams shape library in draw.io

  • New built-in SAP shape library for BTP solution diagrams in draw.io: https://www.drawio.com/blog/sap-diagrams

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 Devtoberfest Promo
2:23 Five years of CPILint
3:17 ML and AI learning content
5:35 SAP BTP Solution Diagrams shape library in draw.io

TRANSCRIPT

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for September 5th, 2024.

[Josh] Hey everybody, it is September-October and that time period reminds me of a certain festival. That's right, Devtoberfest. Devtoberfest, an SAP TechEd event is here. We're putting it on and it starts in two weeks. So the first event is going to happen September 23rd, so please register. It's easy to register, you just join the SAP group. I'll put a link to that community page. And if you're already a member of that community page group, you're already enrolled to participate in Devtoberfest this year. And you can earn points.

And speaking of points, we have that four level game board, you can reach Nerdvana, and you qualify to be in our grand prize drawing. Like years past, people have gone on trips to major theme parks around the world as part of Devtoberfest. So by earning points and learning, you actually get a prize, possibly. So go to that community page and click join.

The other thing I wanted to point out is the number five. It's the fifth year I've had a blue beard, that I've been your blue bearded idiot. But hey, it's also the fifth Devtoberfest. Can you believe it? We've been doing this for developers, by developers for five years, but it's not just for developers, right? Anybody who wants to learn as part of the SAP community can pick a topic they're interested in and they can just complete tutorials or attend events and watch an SAP expert present to them. So five days of the week, five different topics.

Speaking of that, if you look at the calendar in our SAP community page, You'll see Monday has green circles for ABAP and CAP. Tuesday is tooling Tuesdays with a purple circle. That's fun to say. Wednesday we have red circles for integration. Thursday, don't be mad, machine learning AI and data with a blue circle. And then we have front end Fridays with an orange circle. So really, two weeks away, four great weeks of content, but Devtoberfest is five weeks long this year because we are going to stop and do SAP TechEd October 8th and 9th live from Germany. So the developer advocates, a lot of SAP experts will be doing virtual tech ed live during that week of October 8th and 9th. And then we come right back for week three of SAP Devtoberfest on October 14th. So please register. Let's pump up those numbers. Let's do as many tutorials as possible and see how many people can qualify for Nerdvana. Can't wait to see you online. Bye.

[Antonio] Hola, SAP developers. Look what I got over the mail. Yep, a sticker of CPILint CPILint, which is an open-source tool that can help you with your Cloud Integration governance, just turned five years old. Thanks, Morten, for all the great work. And well, to celebrate it, Morten just released a new version of the tool, version 1.0.5, which now supports OAuth 2.0 to communicate with your cloud integration tenant, a mechanism to import a rules file, in a new rule to check user roles. If you want to learn more about CPI-Lint, make sure to check out the tutorial session that we have scheduled for the 25th of September, where Morten will be sharing with us how to automate our SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPI-Lint. Hasta la vista, SAP developers.

[Witalij] You might have heard about SAP HANA Cloud's new capability called the vector engine a lot this year. You might have even participated in the developer challenge, which I organized earlier this year and where we used it as well. Now at the SAP community, you will find two new blog posts describing interesting cases. So one is how metadata enrichment can enhance SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine. And the other one is how leveraging image embeddings and SAP HANA vector engine for reverse product search can be implemented.

If you are joining the new SAP CodeJam topic that my teammate Nora announced last week on getting started with the Generative AI Hub in SAP AI Core, then you would use this capability as well. We have two of these CodeJams already announced, and they are available for you to sign up if you are in Warsaw or in Munich.

Getting started with machine learning using SAP HANA was quite a popular topic for code trends during the first half of this year. But even now we have already four more events scheduled for you. So if you are in Isernhagen or in Stuttgart in Germany, or if you are in Porto or Lisbon in Portugal, then please join me this month if you're interested in some hands-on exercises where you will be using SAP Business Application Studio, Python, and Predictive Analytics Library from SAP HANA Cloud to train some classification models. The other kind of model that are extremely popular among SAP customers are time series forecasting.

And my colleagues, Andreas Foster and Yannick Schaper, published recently a blog post describing how to do that, where they're focusing on one of the most powerful time series forecasting algorithms. And they're showing how to build both single and multiple time series.

[Antonio] Hola, SAP developers. It is easier than ever to get started with SAP BTP solution diagrams. Why is that, you might ask? Well, the icons are now available out of the box in draw.io. All you have to do is click on More Shapes at the bottom of the Shapes panel in draw.io, enable the checkbox next to the SAP Shape library in the Networking section, and click Apply. Voila. All the icons are now available there for you to start your diagrams. I'm looking forward to seeing your architecture diagrams in SAP Community. Happy diagramming.

entry.title: Re: minSdkVersion 26 cannot be smaller than version 30 de...
entry.content:
Check your .mdkproject/App_Resources_Merge/app.gradle and make sure it contains the following and then try running create-client again.

android {
    defaultConfig { 
        minSdkVersion 30
        targetSdkVersion 34
    }
}

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Great workaround. thanks.

I tried to check if it worked for me but it did not. I try to push down to a S4HANA CDS. Unfortunately push downs are mostly needed for transactional data.


However this option is very good for master data tables.

entry.title: Re: MDG BP search result list enhancement
entry.content:
Result list is dependent on attribute list of BP_ROOT only at the moment. One option would be to add the BP_ROLE as additional entity under the feeder class attributes but not sure if that will suit the purpose.

It would also tricky as we are looking at 1:N relation which could cause issue if more than 1 role is assigned to the Business Partner(Usually 2 roles are the norm)

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Thanks for the prompt reply - I had to add below lines to make it work.  Also, 'shallow' line does not work with  xsl 1.0/2.0 but worked with 3.0

               <xsl:template match="@* | node()">
                              <xsl:copy>
                                             <xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
                              </xsl:copy>
               </xsl:template>

My complete xsl - does it need any change ?

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
               <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>
               <!--<xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/> -->
               <!--
              <xsl:template match="/">
                              <xsl:apply-templates select="*"/>
               </xsl:template>
       -->
 
               <xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
                        <xsl:copy>
                                <xsl:value-of select=". + 1"/>
                        </xsl:copy>
               </xsl:template>
                <xsl:template match="@* | node()">
                      <xsl:copy>
                            <xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
                       </xsl:copy>
                </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Migration to S/4 - extension of material number field MATNR
entry.content: Frederic, do you know if is mandatory in S4HANA?? I prefer maintain 18char. of course we dont need 40 , thanks!

entry.title: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content:
Hello, 

we have many batch jobs that are schedule by account where the user as left the organization.

we want to change to the owner of the job to be a generic batch job user.

example: we have this user who as left the company and he had a lot of batch job scheduled. we want to keep these job but we also want to delete that user.

here the created by user is AlexR, we want to change the created by user to user batches.

entry.title: How to rename document's name sent to the printer?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is It possible to rename the document name sent to a printer? I have a report that prints an Adobe Form, when I check the printer queue on Windows, I noticed that a pattern: user+system+sap spool. I would like to change this name for MyDocument for exemple.

entry.title: Re: S4 1610 Extend material lengh to 40 characters
entry.content: Team, do you know if is mandatory in S4HANA to change to 40?? I prefer maintain 18char. of course we dont need 40

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: i forgot to mention we are using ERP ECC 6. SAP BASIS 731, SP13

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: SM37-- Check the job that is scheduled status --All way left corner --Click Job-->Change -->Then Steps -- Click on the Row which contains program name --user parameter etc -->then Click on Pencil Icon -- Change -->-- Job will open up and replace user ID with user id you want to

entry.title: Ensure Deployment Readiness with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement: Discover the New CQC Service
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Community, 

 

A stable technical platform is essential for any company's smooth operation. Whether you’re just starting with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement, adding new functionalities, or performing a routine 'health check,' SAP ensures a seamless process.

For the above reason, we're excited to announce that SAP Enterprise Support now offers a new Continuous Quality Check for Deployment Readiness for SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement.


This service will help you to review your key cloud solution settings to identify potential risks. You'll receive recommendations based on SAP best practices. This service is especially helpful before going live but can also be used as a system health check. Some additional benefits are listed next: 

  • Analyze system configuration.
  • Verify SAP interfaces to ensure stability, performance, and throughput.
  • Review security configuration.
  • Minimize potential risks.
  • Provide recommendations in alignment with SAP best practices.
  • Solution capabilities usage and configuration validation.


How to request this CQC service?

Remote Services can be requested via the new Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  1. Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  2. Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

SAP recommends service booking six (6) weeks before the go-live date, to allow for the delivery four (4) weeks before your go-live date and provide adequate time to review and implement any SAP recommendations.

Any Questions?

Please, contact the SAP Value Map team! 

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

entry.title: Re: How Automated Processing Rules for Bank Statement works?
entry.content: Exceptional blog and with a lot of important content. Great job!

entry.title: Re: S4 1610 Extend material lengh to 40 characters
entry.content: No

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: Hello, that part is fine. what we want to change is the created by users

entry.title: ABAP BW RSA1 program name of routine
entry.content:
Hello ,

Where can I find the generated program name of created routine from RSA1 tcode?

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: You can not change who created the job -- i do not think there should be any relevance who created the job if you job is still relevant -- other option -- cancel the job and create a new job with ID you want it should be created by--still not understanding why it is relevant who created the job?

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: As long as you switch the user to batch user -- jobs will be keep on running even the user ID does not exists in the system.

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content: @Bhaven oops, apologies... I didn't notice that your version was 1.0 and I had copied it and adjusted the logic. It's much simpler to use the shallow-copy with 3.0 than add the extra template IMO.  I updated the answer for accuracy.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: That is exactly what i want to avoid. i have over 600 jobs.

entry.title: Customer fields involved in pricing determination
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For our customer, we’re implementing Subscription billing with S4hana public cloud (scope item 57Z).
Customers are replicated from S4 to Subscription billing.

In S4, the access sequence for pricing is based on tables containing the following fields: material ID, customer ID, customer group 2, customer group 3, where customer group 2 & 3 are the standard fields stored on customer master data -> Sales area level.

The customer requirement: the same tables and access sequence should be used for pricing in subscription billing, this means that fields customer group 2 & 3 should exist in subscription billing -> customer level and and be relevant for pricing.

My initial idea was to create custom references on customer level in subscription billing, to map customer group 2 & 3 in the integration flow to populate the custom references, then to map the custom references in pricing.

Unfortunately it seems that custom references on customer level are not inherited in the subscription, which means that the corresponding values wouldn’t be taken into consideration for pricing determination.

Do you have any suggestion on the best/closest to standard solution to achieve such scenario and avoid a costly development?

Our main doubt is how we could get fields customer group 2 & 3 and their respecting values in subscription billing in a way that they are then relevant for pricing determination. Once this is solved, I think we could reproduce the S4 access sequence via lookup tables and through the fallback strategy in the price element specifications.

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to parse an Employee Central ODATA into ABAP table
entry.content: I found a demo program on how to parse XML, DEMO_SXML_TOKEN_READER. I believe I can use this as an example to get what I need.

entry.title: Re: India Localization Compliance Reports in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @Sahil_Grover 

Can you please tell me how we can correct the place of supply error and error related to date format in GSTR1 report as our GSTR1 report is also getting generated with errors and I am not sure how we can fix this. 

Please highlight the steps

Thank you

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: just follow the steps and change the user as mentioned -- you will be fine. Don't worry about created by.

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content: I don't see the new code - did you paste it ?

entry.title: Re: How to create custom fields in the Business Process with "Custom Field Fiori App ( ID F148
entry.content:
Hi Arasb, thank you for your question!

As for SAP S/4Hana 2023, Custom field app. store the field automatically in custom Fields tab. For transactions VA01/2/3. But you can add the custom field in the SAP Fiori apps. in other sections. For example in Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 ( F3893 ) in the  “New: Sales Order” as a column field.

 

Regards,

Marcela.

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content: @Bhaven I fixed it once, but it's annoying when the alignment gets fouled up so when I "fixed" it again I inadvertently copied the wrong 1.0 version. It's now fixed a second time for accuracy.

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: Hi SAP community, What is the way to add leading zeroes in S4 HANA, call function 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' isn't working, its throwing error - Not allowed

entry.title: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA, Call function 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' is throwing error - Not permitted in restricted scope, what is the other way to remove zeroes and then add zeroes as per the data type?

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Thanks but wandering if I need to add the shallow-copy line. Below code works - it has 3.0 but even 1.0 would suffice.

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>

<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:value-of select=". + 1"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

Thanks

Nikhil

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori front-end server SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: sales solution configurator
entry.content:
Hi,

I Had multiple questions on SAP SSC if anyone has the answer for the same.

1. if i want to run the same with ECC what is required to integrate the same.

2. there is a string mention of "Bottom up" configuration but how does that work with without a BOM especially when i am pushing the created model to a sales order.

3. and what is the role of solution modeling environment, does it come with SAP SSC or a separate purchase

entry.title: Re: Meas doc creation allows points for items not related to Notif Tech OBj
entry.content:
Hello Scott,
The behavior of your SAP system is totally fine.
This is how the standard works.

From functional understanding its like:
People creating a notification (example - maintenance request) for specific asset, can take the readings of this particular equipment, 
and of the others, which are for example in the proximity. 

From pure SAP perspective:
In the screen, which you describe, there is also a button 'All measuring points on Object'. 
Once clicked, only the MPs assigned to this equipment will be visible. 
sapdude SAP PM EAM measuring points course S4HANA
Cheers,
Dan

entry.title: Re: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Arushi,

you can try the ALPHA format option of the string templates. Maybe this works for you.

entry.title: Re: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content: Thank you, this worked for me..

4 Created Failed Money Overflow; cannot display all digits (ODBC -104) Money Overflow; cannot display all digits (ODBC -104)65171


How to fix?

entry.title: Re: Data Transfer Error
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Excel 2402-2408: Access Denied
entry.content: Solution ended up being that Zscaler is the culprit. The authentication system was blocking the connection for the SAP IBP Add In, so it kept denying access. Had to talk to helpdesk to get them to unblock it but wanted to share solution in case others having to authenticate with Zscaler face the same issue.

entry.title: Re: RAP (Rest full application programming) IN SAP ABAP
entry.content:
I'm super confused why this appeared in the TechEd discussions but these days anything goes on SCN, I guess. One cannot be too shy about [ab]using tags when there is hardly anyone left to answer questions here. Sigh...

Not sure I completely understand the idea and question, but I'm guessing you want to sort of implement different updates while making it look like just the creation process from the outside. Depending on what you're actually wanting to do, this is likely feasible. There are 2 ways to implement your own save functionality in RAP: completely unmanaged scenario and "managed with unmanaged save" (one of the posts on the subject). I recommend exploring the latter first and use unmanaged only as a last resort. Sometimes a so-called "functional call" is actually a better option. This is usually the case when there is very little input (sometimes it's just a document number) but then extensive update operations are performed. In this case, it's really not about updating specific "entities". So definitely think first which scenario is the best fit, considering what data is passed around and what DB operations are performed (there are limitations on explicit COMMIT). With RAP, choosing the right scenario is 80% of success.

entry.title: Re: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
data :s1 type string.
s1 = |{ '1234' ALPHA = IN WIDTH = 10 }|. "add 0
s1 = |{ '00001234' ALPHA = OUT }|. "1234.  "remove 0

entry.title: Re: Top Reasons to Attend SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content:
A piece of advice Please! do not miss the KEY100CEST | KEY100EDT SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where Ideas Get Real

Size the exclusive opportunity to hear from the incredible Muhammad Alam, SAP Board Member from SAP Product Engineering! 🌟 This session will unveil game-changing advancements in SAP Build solutions, SAP Business AI, and SAP BTP. 

What’s in Store?

• Inspiration from the top minds at SAP

• Insights into the latest tech trends

• Innovation that you can bring back to your organization

See you there!! #SAPTechEd rocks

entry.title: How to settle AuC to statistical internal order
entry.content:
We have projects managed in SAP-PS, where each SAP-PS project collects construction costs and is settled to an Asset Under Construction (AUC). Once the project is completed and sold, we need to settle the AUC to an internal statistical order to calculate specific costs required by the financial team. Ultimately, these costs should be posted to a cost center.

To achieve this, we use the settlement rule ORD with the statistical internal order (IO) number. However, when settling through CJ88, the system directly settles the AUC to the cost center of the IO and does not post to the statistical IO at all. Is there a way to ensure that the system posts to the statistical IO?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: PO accrual engine re: Prematurely Finished POs.
entry.content: Did you ever figure out what was going on? We also discovered the same issue. Currently sitting at about 43K accrual sub-objects.

entry.title: Re: Automation Launcher in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Sirpa,

Please refer to the attached screenshot ("Automation Launcher.jpg"). Under the Process Automation service, you will find a separate plan for Automation-Attended along with Quota Management. You can follow Step 3 to filter for SAP Build Process Automation.

If you don't see the plan for Automation-Attended, Redirect to the global account, and 1. Click Entity Assignment 2. Search Build Process Automation 3. Select Automation -attended, Please refer to the screenshot attached (Service Plan)

If you need further assistance, feel free to reach out.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community

Thanks for this initiative, it is really amazing. I am Shafique. I am a finance professional, interested to switch to tech side and I was confused where to start from. This initiative clears the air to decide a starting point.

Would highly appreciate if you please send the key (link) to new opportunities.

Thanks and regards

Shafique

entry.title: Re: Dump"DYNPRO_FIELD_CONVERSION" while during reversal of GI
entry.content: the screen has a screen field with take properties from dict, hence the sign value is not displayed, since the value is negative you get the error. analyze how was possible to get a negative value. Check table RESB the quantity withdrawal field are absolute values

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content: @thomas_jung - thanks for letting me know. I didn't know the rules of engagement. I thought it's a community post asking for Code Jam and I replied. But if the offer I made is in breach of compliance, I withdraw it. The intent was good :). Thomas, if you can help me connect with point of contact from SAP in whose collaboration we could run this AEM code jam - I will be very glad to assist. By the way - I work for Solace which is the product underpinning SAP Advanced Event Mesh and I take care of product adoption and EDA evangelism across APJ and Middle East MU. Looking forward to hear from you.

entry.title: Re: ABAP BW RSA1 program name of routine
entry.content: Use the TCode, SE93. RSAWBN_START

entry.title: Can Billing Plan be activated for a Service Material in a Sales Contract?
entry.content:
I am working with Scope Item I9I and I see the option to have Billing plan for a Finished good but not for a Service Item. Can that be configured on CBC or why is that not an option?

I see that in scope item Sales Order Processing with Customer Down Payment BKJ the service material can actually have a billing plan, so I am not sure of the reason of not being able to activate it on a Sales Contract.

Thanks,

MR

entry.title: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories in View Mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content:
Problem:

The Number formatting changes when the story is executed in view mode or story is executed via Hyperlink or story is executed from the link shared.

Workaround :

The story works fine when we access directly from the Public folder. We are using Live connection and Backend is SAP HANA. 

Impact :

We have created a Dashboard with all the story Hyperlinks and Business will access the respective Dashboards from the Hyperlink provided. From the Business point of view nothing is working as expected.

Observation :  

The issue started with latest SAC patch upgrade on Aug 17-18th 2024.

Currently we are with this version :

Versions

2024.15.8 (Client)

2024.15.6 (Server)

Build Dates

Wed Aug 28 2024 16:36:34+0000 (Client)

Wed Aug 21 2024 17:52:03+0200 (Server)

Few more Observations from tests conducted :

  1. Number formatting changes for a newly created story as well when used measure based input control.
  2. Number formatting changes even when there is no % calculations involved.
  3. Number formatting changes only with the Cross calculations.
  4. Above issues exists in Optimized design for both Responsive page and Classic page as well.
  5. Only few story have this issue after the SAC Patch upgrade.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning #SACCROSSCALCULATIONS #SACPATCH

entry.title: sap sac bi license
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I realize that Planning Professional allows you to develop planning application and Planning Standard license allows users to use the planning apps to enter and interact with planning data.  My question is would a user with BI license who will not be doing any planning but only view planning data in stories using planning model?  I want to limit Planning Standard licenses.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: Widget color is not displayed when SAC story is executed in view mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content:
Problem:

The Widget color is not displayed when the story is executed in view mode or story is executed via Hyperlink or story is executed from the link shared.

Workaround :

The story works fine when we access directly from the Public folder. We are using Live connection and Backend is SAP HANA. 

Impact :

We have created a Dashboard with all the story Hyperlinks and Business will access the respective Dashboards from the Hyperlink provided. From the Business point of view nothing is working as expected.

Observation :  

The issue started with latest SAC patch upgrade on Aug 17-18th 2024.

Currently we are with this version :

Versions

2024.15.8 (Client)

2024.15.6 (Server)

Build Dates

Wed Aug 28 2024 16:36:34+0000 (Client)

Wed Aug 21 2024 17:52:03+0200 (Server)

Few more Observations  :

  1. Widget color is not displayed for the newly created story as well, we used widget color  to highlight measure based input control.
  2. Above issues exists in Optimized design for both Responsive page and Classic page as well.
  3. Only few story have this issue after the SAC Patch upgrade.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling #SAP_WIDGET #SAC_PATCH

entry.content:
Hi dear SAP Community. Can anyone advise me on how to get back the BEx Analyzer Icons on the Add-Ins Menu in Excel?

I currently only have the Bex Analyzer Menu in the Menu Commands area, but the icons that showed on the right of this menu have disappeared.

Thanks!

entry.title: Unlocking SAP BTP: Your Guide to SAP Business Technology Platform Use Case One-Pagers
entry.content:
SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) offers a unified environment that allows businesses to bring together application development, automation, data and analytics, integration, and AI capabilities, all optimized for SAP applications. However, with such a suite of tools, knowing where to start with SAP BTP can be the most challenging part for businesses. To support organizations in their digital transformation journey and help customers unlock the full potential of SAP BTP, we created SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers.  

 

Understanding SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers

The SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers serves as an effective compass for businesses. It explains the business values, features, and implementation strategies of various components within the SAP BTP ecosystem. The main goal of these one-pagers is to simplify the complexities of digital solutions and streamline your journey toward full adoption and utilization of the SAP BTP portfolio.

The SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers also highlights the proven and validated use cases that customers should look to first. Examples of measurable business value with targeted solutions to business challenges show the potential outcomes of SAP BTP utilization.

 

How to utilize SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers:

With the SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers at your disposal, your first step is to identify the business challenge or growth area you want to address. This could range from enhancing customer experiences to improving decision-making capabilities with real-time data. You could also drill down to your line of business/department area to see what use cases are available. Consider a business that is currently utilizing SAP S/4HANA for Finance.

  1. In this scenario, you can start with the SAP S/4HANA Finance section of the One-Pager, and read through the business challenges each use case targets. 
  2. Let’s say you know that your company is having a tough time with manual processes that take time, and some manual document processes are especially prone to errors. The 'Automate processes to empower finance professionals' use case provides a clear insight into the capabilities of SAP BTP connecting SAP S/4HANA to various applications and processes.

    • SAP Integration Suite can seamlessly integrate finance with sales and HR, while SAP Build Process Automation fosters an automated, cohesive workflow to create a streamlined and unified workflow that enhances efficiency and productivity.

  3. You now understand the expected outcomes and the value the use case will bring to your business, with a step-by-step implementation guide from the corresponding Discovery Center Missions. The Mission shows the reference architecture, practical guidance for implementing the use case, and business accelerators to help ensure a smooth implementation.

  4. You can also read further about other existing customers that are deriving business value with SAP BTP, or take the Learning course. 

 

Begin leveraging these resources today to unlock the full potential of the SAP Business Technology Platform, foster business innovation, and accelerate growth. So why wait? Immerse yourself in these invaluable guides now and embark on a transformative journey with SAP BTP Use Case One-Pagers today!

entry.title: Re: How to Connect S4HANA Public Cloud With SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @Charls ,

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system, communication arrangements have been created for the following communication scenarios:

  • SAP_COM_0532

    For more information, see Integrating CDS Views Using SAP Datasphere in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

  • SAP_COM_0531

    For more information, see Integrating CDI in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

  • SAP_COM_0722

    For more information, see Integrating SAP Data Warehouse Cloud in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/abb159e027184c98a54fc1b2a88dd3f5.html?locale=en-US

Secondly, It is possible to use Data Flow and Remote Table at the same time and you have to select 

Data Provisioning Option "Data Provisioning Agent" and your DP agent while creating connection in Datasphere. Depending on the features of remote tables, you have to assign the above scenarios 

Hope it answers your question!

Regards,

Armaan

entry.title: Re: RFC SLD_UC/SLD_NUC
entry.content:
Dear Customer， 

Please check in the reg_info file of SMD if SLD_UC and SLD_NUC are maintained correctly. Following two KBAs are helpful to resolve the error

2866111 - SLD_UC gateway connection returns 748 after solman 7.2 upgrade
2075799 - ERROR: Error (Msg EGW 748 not found) [VIDEO]

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Unable to get SCROM progress
entry.content:
Hi Kenny,

You only have one SCO in your eLearning course, that's the overall Book object.  Book objects, each of the Simulation modes, and Quizzes count as SCOs.  In your instance, you only have one SCO so the system will assign 100% of the course completion value to the Book object.  This means you must access the underlying Book Pages to get that value.  Ultimately, I think the system is doing what you asked, if you complete the Book Pages beneath the Book, the system is registering your course complete.

The only question I would have is why you have set the Send Success Status value to Never?  If you only want to track course completion, I guess this is fine.  However, if you want to determine if users have successfully completed Quizzes embedded in other eLearnings, I suspect that this will be an issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 3-System Landscape: From Basics to Comp
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasSchneider 

Is there a way to create a new custom transport attribute (similar to thru old SE03) on S/4HANA Cloud?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to access Message processing logs in cpi using gr...
entry.content:
One way to handle this would be to add the standard message logging groovy script in your exception sub-process. This way, the groovy script is executed when there is any failure and stores the message.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
    def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
    if(messageLog != null){
        messageLog.setStringProperty("Logging#1", "Printing Payload As Attachment")
        messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("ResponsePayload:", body, "text/plain");
     }
    return message;
}

The process to acquire the CAL licenses is quite clear but we cannot find much information on who to contact to get the underneath product licences (S/4HANA per example). It is said "to contact your sales representative". As a new customer we do not have one yet.

What is the process to get in touch with one ?

Thanks !

Is there something wrong in my formula?

I'm thinking about implementing note 674581, does anyone know if it would solve the problem?

Thank you in advance,

Carol.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud EPIC Integration
entry.content:
针对在 SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud 上实施 EPIC 有如下问题想进行确认：

1.当前我们想先实施两家银行 中国银行和汇丰银行，这两个银行是否都需要前置机？如果只是把文件传输到银行的Portal 端，而不是直接付款 是否也同样需要前置机？

2. 在SAP S/4 HANA OP 版本上，系统有内置6家 中国银行的报文格式，在SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud  上是否同样有内嵌这6家中国银行的报文格式？还是说我们需要一个中间平台把SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud  中标准的报文格式转换成相应银行的报文格式？

3. 我们在SAP 发布的SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud   EPIC 中有看到如下一张图：


图中的“合作伙伴”指的是什么？他的具体功能除了报文转换外还有什么功能？此“合作伙伴” 是否是必须的？

entry.title: Re: order BOM explode in a sales order line
entry.content: order bom creation is after sales order line creation. because order Bom has a prerequite condition, that is you must specify the order line no. so for the first time, sales order line creation, it can NOT explode order-bom. So, if order-bom can be used in BOM explosion, there shoulde a method to reload the order-bom into the order.

Here the completion picture of the learning journey:

I hope that you will consider my request.

Thank you!

entry.title: Multiple Address Handling in Service Transactions (Using Bill-to Party)
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP S/4HANA Cloud supports multiple address handling in SD documents and service transactions. You can find sufficient documentation about this feature in SAP Help Portal and prepare your system for this feature. Preparation and configuration guides are provided in the attachment to the SAP Note 3119364.

If you’re a user of service transactions (such as service contracts, service orders, etc.), you can follow this blog in which we're going to extract the content from those BIG guides and summarize the most essential parts for service transactions only. This is a short guide for Service users.

In this blog, we're going to use the bill-to party and the service order in our example.

Step 1: Activate multiple address handling for customer master data in SAP Business Partner

Find the configuration activity Activate Multiple Address Handling for Customer Master Data in SAP BP. Switch to On to enable the function.

Fig.1 Activate for customer master data

Step 2: Prepare your business partner master data

You can use apps and integration integration technologies in SAP S/4HANA Cloud to prepare your BP master data. See more information in the Master Data Guide attached to the SAP Note 3119364.

Step 3: Activate multiple address handling in SD documents using SAP Business Partner

Find the configuration activity Activate Multiple Address Handling in SD Documents using SAP BP. Switch to On to enable the function.

Fig. 2 Activate for SD

Step 4: Set up partner determination for sales document header

Find the configuration activity Set Up Partner Determination for Sales Document Header. Go to the partner determination procedure SO02 Sales Order. In its partner functions, find the function Bill-to Party that you want to set up. Choose BBP004 in the Address Determination for Partner Function column.

Note that if you can’t see the Address Determination for Partner Function column, it’s most probably that the switch state in the Activate Multiple Address Handling in SD Documents using SAP BP configuration (step 3 above) is not ON.

Fig.3 Set up partner determination in SD

Fig.4 Partner Function in Procedure

In the Partner Functions section, the partner function type KU and the address determination transaction BBP004 for the partner function Bill-to Party are maintained. 

Fig.5 Set up partner function

The following steps can be found in the configuration guide attached to the SAP Note 3119364. From there, you can also find the guidance for other types of business partners such as sold-to party and ship-to party.

Step 5: Set up partner determination for Service

Find the configuration activity Define Partner Determination Procedure in Service. Create your own partner determination procedure (e.g. ZSVO1001) and configure its partner functions (Partner Functions in Procedure tab):

  1. Choose the bill-to party partner function for Service (CRM)
  2. Map the CRM bill-to party to the address determination transaction BBP004
  3. Set the attribute Changeable Address
Fig.6 Partner Determination Procedure in Service

 Fig.7 Partner Function in Service

Step 6: Assign partner determination procedure to service order

Find the configuration activity Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Transaction Types. Choose the transaction type SVO1 for standard service orders. Assign your customed partner determination procedure (e.g. ZSVO1001) to it.

Fig.8 Assign Partner Determ. Procedure to Service Transaction

Fig.9 Assignment Details

The steps above can be found in the configuration guide attached to the SAP Note 3119364. From there, you can also find the guidance for other types of business partners such as sold-to party and ship-to party.

Step 7: Add additional billing address to your business partner

Find the app to maintain your business partner master data. For example, the Maintain Business Partner app. Add a new address for your business partner and make it the billing address. In our case, we use the business partner 17100003.

Fig.10 Add a new address

 

Fig.11 Maintain billing address

Step 8: Test the address in service order and its follow-ups

Go to the Manage Service Orders app. Create a new service order. Go to the Parties Involved tab. You can find the additional address is displayed.

Fig.12 Bill-to address in service order

Release the service order and create the service confirmation for billing. A billing document request is created for that service confirmation. 

Fig.13 Service confirmation created to service order

You can find the billing address that you maintained visible in the BDR of the service confirmation. That information will be subsequently forwarded to a follow-up billing document such as an invoice.

Fig.14 Bill-to address in BDR

Conclusion

In this blog, we summarized the major steps to use the multiple address handling in Service area of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition. We used the bill-to party and service order as the example to demonstrate you the steps. We also verified the settings in the service order processing. We hope this little guide can help you with the entire procedure. 

Additional Reading

SAP Help Portal: Multiple Address Handling in SD Documents Using SAP Business Partner
